summary.en: Utility-scale PV projects connected to Uzbekistan's national or regional electricity networks require project-specific grid-connection review, technical conditions, protection settings, power-quality evidence, dispatch or telemetry interfaces, and commissioning documentation. The National Electric Grid of Uzbekistan (Uzenergo) and regional energy companies set connection technical conditions for their respective networks. Grid-connection requirements are issued as technical conditions (teknicheskie usloviya) specific to the project, capacity, and connection point.
summary.zh: 接入乌兹别克斯坦国家或区域电网的公用事业级光伏项目需要项目专属的并网审查、技术条件、保护设置、电能质量证据、调度或遥测接口以及调试文件。乌兹别克斯坦国家电网（Uzenergo）和区域能源公司为各自电网发布并网技术条件。并网要求以针对项目、容量和接入点的专属技术条件形式发布。
summary.zht: 接入烏茲別克斯坦國家或區域電網的公用事業級光伏項目需要項目專屬的併網審查、技術條件、保護設定、電能品質證據、調度或遙測介面以及調試文件。烏茲別克斯坦國家電網（Uzenergo）和區域能源公司為各自電網發布併網技術條件。併網要求以針對項目、容量和接入點的專屬技術條件形式發布。

standards_or_laws: National Electric Grid of Uzbekistan (Uzenergo) technical conditions for grid connection
Regional energy company connection requirements for distribution-level projects
Uzbekistan electricity grid regulations and power-system connection procedures
Project-specific dispatch, protection, metering, and telemetry requirements
O'z DSt / GOST power-quality and grid-protection standards

summary.en: China-side grid documentation usually references GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection and GB/T 37408-2021 for inverter technical requirements. These documents are useful for explaining inverter capability and design basis but do not substitute for Uzbekistan network studies, Uzenergo or regional-company technical conditions, or commissioning acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国侧并网文件通常引用GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定和GB/T 37408-2021逆变器技术要求。这些文件有助于说明逆变器能力和设计依据，但不能替代乌兹别克斯坦电网研究、Uzenergo或区域公司技术条件或调试验收。
summary.zht: 中國側併網文件通常引用GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定和GB/T 37408-2021逆變器技術要求。這些文件有助於說明逆變器能力和設計依據，但不能替代烏茲別克斯坦電網研究、Uzenergo或區域公司技術條件或調試驗收。

gap.en: The gap is project engineering: Uzbekistan protection, voltage/reactive-power, frequency, SCADA, metering, fault-ride-through, and commissioning settings must be agreed with the relevant network operator and documented in project-specific technical conditions. A China grid-code test certificate is not sufficient for energization. For internationally-financed projects, lender independent engineers (IFC/EBRD) will additionally review grid-connection documentation against IEC standards.
gap.zh: 差距在于项目工程：乌兹别克斯坦保护、电压/无功、频率、SCADA、计量、故障穿越和调试设置必须与相关电网运营商确认，并在项目专属技术条件中记录。中国并网标准测试证书不足以支持送电。对于国际融资项目，IFC/EBRD出借方独立工程师还将按IEC标准审查并网文件。
gap.zht: 差距在於項目工程：烏茲別克斯坦保護、電壓/無功、頻率、SCADA、計量、故障穿越和調試設定必須與相關電網運營商確認，並在項目專屬技術條件中記錄。中國併網標準測試證書不足以支持送電。對於國際融資項目，IFC/EBRD出借方獨立工程師還將按IEC標準審查併網文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected projects according to the relevant network operator's technical conditions and connection approval
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic China grid connection under China project approval; not accepted as Uzbekistan grid approval

source.publisher: Ministry of Energy of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 19964-2024 and GB/T 37408 help describe inverter capability, but Uzbekistan energization depends on Uzenergo or regional-company technical conditions, project-specific commissioning evidence, and, for financed projects, lender independent-engineer acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 19964-2024和GB/T 37408有助于说明逆变器能力，但乌兹别克斯坦送电取决于Uzenergo或区域公司技术条件、项目专属调试证据，以及融资项目中出借方独立工程师的验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 19964-2024和GB/T 37408有助於說明逆變器能力，但烏茲別克斯坦送電取決於Uzenergo或區域公司技術條件、項目專屬調試證據，以及融資項目中出借方獨立工程師的驗收。
